github.description: GitHub repository access - read/write files, PRs, issues

exa.description: Exa AI search - deep web research for documentation and examples

steps: 2. Generate a new token (classic) with 'repo' scope
3. Add to your environment: export GITHUB_PAT=your_token
2. Get your API key from the dashboard
3. Add to your environment: export EXA_API_KEY=your_key
2. Get your API key from settings
3. Add to your environment: export CONTEXT7_API_KEY=your_key

_usage_notes.agent_integration: These MCP servers enhance agent capabilities:
_usage_notes.researcher: Uses exa for web search, github for repo exploration
_usage_notes.architect: Uses context7 for library docs when designing
_usage_notes.executor: Uses github for reading existing code patterns
